content: The power of a god cannot be overcome. >> Zanzar, this is the providence of the world. Even gods are merely being restricted to the limited power determined by propaganda power, although great is not unlimited. >> That voice. >> Our best, how dare you disobey me? I am Menardar, I was here at the beginning and I will proclaim the end. >> Rebat, that's impossible. >> True. It is time for you to choose. Does this world belong to Zanzar or does it belong to war? That is something I decide it long ago. We use our power to fail a god and then these are destiny. It's fainting the memory of a ghong's existence born from the chaos of creation. It is.
